untranslatable_reason: This signal requires calendar/holiday detection logic that cannot be expressed using the allowed technical indicators and operators. The entry and exit conditions are based on absolute dates relative to major holidays (2 days before, 1 day before), not technical price/volume conditions. The backtest engine would need a holiday calendar module and date-based condition evaluation beyond the scope of technical indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_10 is an event-driven/calendar-based strategy from Merrill's holiday research (1897-1964, 67.9% upward moves day prior to holidays). It cannot be translated to the allowed indicator/operator framework which supports only technical analysis conditions. Implementation would require: (1) holiday calendar integration, (2) date arithmetic operators, or (3) a dedicated EVENT condition type not in the current allowed operators list.
